tracks.meaning: a tube or channel in the body through which fluids pass, especially the urinary or biliary system
a pipe or channel that carries away water or liquid waste from a building or surface
a watercourse or natural channel through which water flows away from an area
to remove water or excess moisture from land to make it suitable for cultivation
to cause liquid to flow away or out of something gradually
a medical tube inserted into a wound or body cavity to remove unwanted fluid
to drink a beverage completely and quickly
to flow away or disappear gradually, especially said of liquids or people
the gradual loss or dissipation of emotional energy or mental resources
a continuous outflow or loss of money or financial resources
